name: VDX Networks
notes:
We operate an open peering policy and welcome sessions with networks of all sizes at shared IXPs.

RPKI validation is strictly enforced — invalid announcements are rejected.

IRR filtering is applied; route objects must exist in a valid IRR source.

Max-prefix limits are configured based on PeeringDB data or bilateral agreement.

MD5 authentication is supported on request.

We do not require a minimum traffic volume to peer.

Please refer to our listed contact points for peering or operational matters.
